title: Release Manifest
description: Metadata shipped with every platform release to drive the upgrade orchestrator.

minPreviousVersion.description: Oldest platform version that can upgrade directly to this release (N-2 minor window).

breakingMigrations.description: Migration names that require a maintenance window (empty = online upgrade safe).

expectedDowntimeSeconds.description: Estimated downtime in seconds for breaking migrations (0 = online upgrade).

rollbackSupported.description: Whether version-row rollback is safe for this release.
